/CAL:TRANSPORTATION ORDER FROM CDC TO SF COUNTY JAIL/X:PROPER ORDER FILEDAND SIGNED,/CTORDS:SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO PROCEED TO CDC - SAN QUENTIN STATE PRISON,/X:MARIN COUNTY, AND TAKE FRANK MEJIA INTO CUSTODY SO HE MAY SERVE THE/X:CONSECUTIVE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IMPOSED BY JUDGE HAINESON 01-04-08,/

/CAL:RE-SENTENCING FROM COURT OF APPEALS/DEF:ORIGINALLY SENTENCED 02-03-06//AJW/CH1:SP 4Y:U /CTSP:302/X:CREDIT FOR TIME SERVE IS CALCULATED AS OF 02-03-06/CH2:SP 8M:3/CH3:SP8M:3/STATES/DNA/RESTSP1:0/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION IF THERE IS ANY RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM,/CTORD:COUNT 2 240PC M(LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF COUNT 2) 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL STAYED PUR 654PC/CTORD:COUNT 5- 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL TO SERVE CONSECUTIVE TO THE SENTENCE IMPOSED IN COUNT 1/CTORD:THE DEPARTMENT OF CDC TO DELIVER THE DEFENDANT BACK TOTHE CUSTODY OF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO SERVE THE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE ON COUNT 5/  /VF5:10000/PAR/CDC/

/X BOTH SIDES MAKE STATEMENTS TO THE COURT,/X THE COURT READS A VICTIM IMCT STATEMENT INTO THE RECORD,/AJW/CH1:SP 4Y:U/CTSP:301/STATES/DNA/SECFEE/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/RESTSP1:16000/UNABLE/CTORD:COUNT 2, 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL,STAYED PURSUANT TO 654PC/CTORD:COUNT 3, 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON, ONE THIRD THE MIDTERM, CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1/CTORD:COUNT 4, 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON, ONE THIRD THE MIDTERM, CONSECUTIVE TO COIUNT 1/CTORD:COUNT 5, 1 YEAR COUNTYJAIL, FULLY CONSECUTIVE TO THE STATE PRISON SENTENCE IMPOSED IN COUNT 1/

/TEXT TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATION//X:THE JURY RETURNS VERDICTS OF GUILTY AS TO COUNT 1, 2(THE LESSER CHARGE OF240PC, MISDEMEANOR), 3 AND 4 AS MORE FULLY REFLECTED IN THE MINUTES AND NOTES OF THE COURT REPORTER,/

/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PRETRIAL MOTIONS IN PROGRESS//X:AT 10:15 A,M,, A PANEL OF JURORS ARE SWORN RE QUALIFICATIONS, VOIR DIRE WITH JURY QUESTINNAIRE COMMENCES,/X:OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, A 402EC HEARING IS HELD,/X:THOMAS WALSH IS SWORN AND TESTIFIES FOR THE PEOPLE,/
/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN DA:MARIA MEJIA//EXHMA:PEO #1) SUBPOENAED MEDICAL RECORD/HTA1:1, 2, 3, & 4//X:MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 5 & 6 ARE CERTIFIED/BAIL:750,000/DEFTCUST3/
/CAL:HRG TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO THE RECORD/X:COURT SPREADS MINUTES ONTO THE RECORD, JUDGEMENT AFFIRMED/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENDANT HAS BEEN DELIVERED TO CDC   /
/CAL:STATUS OF CDC DELIVERY/CONTD STATUS OF CDC DELIVERY/
/X:CAUSE ON CALENDAR IN ERROR, THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
